name: exPDite-2 bemdaneprocel Parkinson disease phase 3 trial
summary: A recruiting randomized, triple-masked, sham-surgery-controlled phase 3 trial testing bemdaneprocel in adults with Parkinson disease.
population: Adults with Parkinson disease eligible for sham-surgery-controlled dopaminergic neuronal cell therapy testing

trial_details.expected_results_window: No completion date is recorded locally; no near-term result expectation should be assumed.
trial_details.horizon_note: The trial is still planned, recruiting, or active in local records and should remain on watch until results are available.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation because they can show whether the intervention changes function and safety in Adults with Parkinson disease eligible for sham-surgery-controlled dopaminergic neuronal cell therapy testing. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
